name: EPG Suggester
description: Scans channels without EPG assignments and suggests the best matching EPG entry based on fuzzy channel name matching. Strips IPTV prefixes (US|, UK:), quality tags (HD, 4K), and noise words (VIP, backup) before scoring. Supports callsign matching, source priority, auto-apply with rollback, dry-run preview, CSV export/import workflow, and audit of already-matched channels.
author: Jan Erik (custom)

fields.label: 🎯 Minimum Match Score (0-100)
fields.help_text: Only suggest EPG entries scoring at or above this threshold. Lower = more suggestions but less accurate. Start at 60, raise to 70+ once results look good.

fields.label: 📋 Max Suggestions Per Channel
fields.help_text: Maximum number of EPG candidates to show per unmatched channel (1-10).

fields.label: 📡 Limit to EPG Sources (optional)
fields.help_text: Comma-separated EPG source names to search within. Leave blank to search all sources.

fields.label: ⭐ Preferred EPG Sources (priority order)
fields.help_text: When multiple sources match equally, prefer sources listed first. Comma-separated, highest priority first. Leave blank to use score alone.

fields.label: 📂 Limit to Channel Groups (optional)
fields.help_text: Comma-separated channel group names to scan. Leave blank to scan all groups.

fields.label: 🌍 Strip Geographic Prefixes (US|, UK:, USA: …)
fields.help_text: Remove country/region prefixes before matching so 'US| CNN' matches 'CNN'. Disable if your channel names intentionally include country codes as part of the name.

fields.label: 🎬 Strip Quality Tags (HD, SD, 4K, FHD, UHD…)
fields.help_text: Remove quality suffixes/prefixes before matching so 'CNN HD' matches 'CNN'.

fields.label: 🔧 Strip Misc Tags (vip, backup, +1…)
fields.help_text: Remove common IPTV noise words before matching.

fields.label: ⚡ Auto-Apply Best Match (use with caution!)
fields.help_text: When enabled, 'Apply Best Suggestions' will actually write EPG assignments. A rollback snapshot is always saved first. Always review the CSV export or dry-run first!

fields.label: 🔒 Auto-Apply Min Score (0-100)
fields.help_text: Safety floor for auto-apply and dry-run. Only matches scoring at or above this will be assigned. Also used by 'Audit Matched Channels' to flag better matches.

actions.label: 🔍 Scan & Suggest EPG
actions.description: Scan all channels without EPG assigned and suggest the best matching EPG entries. Results shown as a report with score and match type (callsign / fuzzy).

actions.label: 📤 Export Suggestions to CSV
actions.description: Run the suggestion scan and save full results to /data/exports/epg_suggester_TIMESTAMP.csv. Edit the CSV to remove unwanted rows, then use 'Apply from CSV' to apply it.

actions.label: 🧪 Dry Run Apply
actions.description: Preview exactly which EPG assignments 'Apply Best Suggestions' would make, without writing anything to the database. Uses the auto-apply threshold regardless of whether auto-apply is enabled.

actions.label: ✅ Apply Best Suggestions
actions.description: Assign the top EPG suggestion to each unmatched channel scoring at or above the auto-apply threshold. Requires 'Auto-Apply' to be enabled. A rollback snapshot is saved first — use 'Restore Last Apply' to undo.

confirm.title: Apply EPG Suggestions?
confirm.message: This will assign EPG data to unmatched channels. A rollback snapshot will be saved first. Make sure you have reviewed the dry-run or CSV export. Continue?

actions.label: 📥 Apply from CSV
actions.description: Apply EPG assignments from the most recently exported CSV. Delete rows you don't want applied before running. Only rank=1 rows are processed. A rollback snapshot is saved first.

confirm.title: Apply from CSV?
confirm.message: This will apply EPG assignments from the latest exported CSV. Have you edited the CSV to remove any rows you don't want applied? A rollback snapshot will be saved. Continue?

actions.label: ↩ Restore Last Apply
actions.description: Revert EPG assignments to the state before the most recent apply operation. Reads the latest rollback snapshot from /data/exports/.

confirm.title: Restore Last Apply?
confirm.message: This will revert EPG assignments to the state captured in the most recent rollback snapshot. Continue?

actions.label: 🔎 Audit Matched Channels
actions.description: Scan channels that already have EPG assigned and flag any where a better match now exists. Useful after adding a new EPG source. Does not modify the database.

actions.label: 📊 Statistics
actions.description: Show a quick overview of matched vs unmatched channel counts by group and total EPG entries available. No matching engine run — instant results.

actions.label: 📺 List Unmatched Channels
actions.description: Show a quick list of all channels that have no EPG assigned, without running the full suggestion engine.
